backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor with no backend logic, serving as a placeholder for a static informational website.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (HeroSection, AboutSection, JobCategoriesSection, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object providing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key content of every component and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for Dream Jobs Consultancy with SEO meta tags, Open Graph and Twitter Card metadata, favicon links, Google Search Console verification, and canonical URL.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application component that composes all page sections in order, including Header, HeroSection, AboutSection, ApplicationSection, ContactSection, Footer, and a floating WhatsApp button.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section displaying a corporate meeting image alongside the company description text, a branded quote callout, and four stats cards (3+ Years, 6 Gulf Countries, placements, licensed).
frontend/src/components/ApplicationSecti: Job application form section with fields for name, phone, job category (grouped by sector), desired Gulf country, experience, and additional info, featuring client-side validation and a success confirmation state.
frontend/src/components/ConnectWithUsSec: Renders a 'Connect With Us' section displaying social media icon links (Facebook, X, LinkedIn, Instagram) sourced from a config file, hiding the section entirely if no links are configured.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Displays a contact section with Dream Jobs Consultancy's India and UAE office details, email, and a WhatsApp modal trigger for reaching out.
frontend/src/components/DisclaimerSectio: Renders an 'Important Information' section with four disclaimer cards covering job placements, service fees, visa processing, and legal compliance.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying company info, quick navigation links, UAE and India office addresses, contact details, and social media icons with a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/FounderSection.t: Displays a founder profile section for Basheer Ahmed (CEO) with a photo, quote, and bio describing his 3 years of international recruitment experience.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed site header with a logo, smooth-scroll desktop navigation, and a mobile slide-out sheet menu; applies a backdrop blur shadow on scroll.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero section for Dream Jobs Consultancy featuring a full-screen airport background image with blue overlay, key value propositions, and CTA buttons including a WhatsApp modal trigger and scroll-to-apply action.
frontend/src/components/HowItWorksSectio: Displays a 4-step horizontal timeline (Submit CV → Matching → Interview → Deployment) with icons, step numbers, and a note about the 4–8 week average process timeline.
frontend/src/components/JobCategoriesSec: Renders six Gulf job recruitment categories (e.g., Household Staff, Hospitality, Security) with role listings, shown as a card grid on desktop and an accordion on mobile.
frontend/src/components/ManagementSectio: Profiles the consultancy manager Salman Khan with contact cards for India and UAE offices, each providing phone links and WhatsApp buttons.
frontend/src/components/OurOfficesSectio: Displays three office locations (UAE Ajman Free Zone, Bengaluru India, Ahmedabad India) with addresses and license details in styled cards alongside an office location image.
frontend/src/components/RecruitmentProce: Presents a 6-step placement process (Application → Screening → Interview → Offer → Medical/Visa → Deployment) as a numbered card grid with icons and descriptions, plus a closing summary banner.
Renders a grid of six service cards (job placement, CV enhancement, interview prep, etc.) with icons, titles, and descriptions for the agency's offerings section.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialsSect: Displays a carousel/slider of customer testimonials with names, roles, locations, ratings, and review text from placed candidates across Gulf countries.
frontend/src/components/VisionMissionSec: Renders the Vision, Mission, and Core Values section with two info cards and a four-item values grid displayed on a branded gradient background.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppFloat.ts: Floating WhatsApp button that opens a modal letting users choose between India or UAE office WhatsApp contacts to initiate a chat.
frontend/src/components/WhyTrustUsSectio: Displays a 'Why Choose Us' section with six trust-point cards, a recruitment specialization blurb, and key metrics (placements, partners, satisfaction rate) on a gradient background.
frontend/src/config/socialLinks.ts: Centralized config object exporting social media profile URLs (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram), all currently set to empty strings to suppress rendering.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: A minimal placeholder hook that returns an empty object, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static website.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Poppins and Roboto fonts, sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities, and defines CSS custom properties for a deep blue and gold color scheme in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based custom color tokens (brand, sidebar, chart), Poppins/Roboto font families, custom border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes. Includes typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot describing a Dream Jobs Consultancy overseas recruitment website with its features, color scheme, image requirements, and existing implemented sections (hero, about, job categories, recruitment process, contact). Tracks version 3 of the project state.
